<!-- indicator: tbl-preterm-births-percent (fallback) -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-preterm-births-percent
#| tbl-cap: 'Table showing Preterm births percent.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-preterm-births-percent", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```
